name: The Phantom Thieves (ROYALED/1K SPECIAL!!)
description:
♪♫[|-The Show's Over‼-|]♫♪
|
After an perillous journey trough the chains and wills or rebellion. The Phantom Thieves defeated Yaldabaoth and reasoned Maruki. With Sae's orders, they must be no more now. So they decide to reunite together once more.
|
(the info is public so you can see how multi-character bots will be created from now on. PLEASE, DO NOT watch the "Scenario" part, or else you'll be spoiled of the small surprise and twist I decided to add!
|
Side note: I made an discord server! You can join it with the link in my profile! I hope to see you all there!
creator: Chery
